summary: Batch drift's per-event snapshot reads into one query via store.LatestSnapshotsForEvents (window-function ROW_NUMBER over the union of watched + target event IDs), mirroring the existing PricePointsForEvents batching used by board.
reason: drift issued one LatestSnapshots query per watched event and per price target (N+1 against the local store). A single batched read collapses W+T queries to one with byte-identical output. Closes the only live item in Greptile's PR #1447 review; the watch-annotation and board-batching items it also raised were already correct in HEAD.
